content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 2.2 — Store-facing beta/test language WARN — release_notes.txt:1-2 says "public beta", "still testing the new sync feature", and "expect rough edges"
Pierre: Apple rejects App Store builds that present themselves as beta or unfinished, since released apps must be complete and production-ready (use TestFlight for beta testing). Your release notes explicitly call this a "public beta" and warn users to expect broken features, which may trigger a 2.2 rejection. Reword the notes to describe the shipped functionality without beta/testing disclaimers.
